payload.tactic: have EQ := HP (fun _ (g: glob UFCMA_l) _ => size g.`6 <= qdec /\ exists (p:tag*tag), p \in g.`6 /\ p.`1 = p.`2) (fun _ (g: glob UFCMA_l) _ => find (fun (p:tag*tag) => p.`1 = p.`2) g.`6) (iota_ 0 qdec) &m (iota_uniq 0 qdec).
